languages.text: "Ксеноересь, называемая ее последователями "Анкер-ядром". Павшие братья говорили, что предатель Декабалус осквернил священные энергетические паттерны станции. Проклятое Омниссией устройство питало Движущей Силой центральную буровую установку и стабилизационные механизмы. Без него машинный дух станции Тиркуаз-4 отключится и обретет покой".

"The xenoheresy referred to by its followers as the 'anchor-core.'" My fallen comrades said that the traitor Decabalus had desecrated the station's sacred energy patterns. This Omnissiah-damned device was powering the central drill complex and stabilisation mechanisms with the Motive Force. Without it, the machine spirit of Tirkuaz-4 would shut down and find peace."
languages.original_text: "Ксеноересь, называемая ее последователями "Анкер-ядром". Павшие братья говорили, что предатель Декабалус осквернил священные энергетические паттерны станции. languages.text: 「異教徒が『アンカーコア』と呼ぶものが、敵のデカバルスによって汚された。このオムニシアの呪われた装置は、動力源で中央のドリルと安定化装置を動いていた。これがなければ、ティルクアズ4の機械霊は休むだろう」
languages.original_text: "The xenoheresy referred to by its followers as the 'anchor-core.'" My fallen comrades said that the traitor Decabalus had desecrated the station's sacred energy patterns. This Omnissiah-damned device was powering the central drill complex and stabilisation mechanisms with the Motive Force. Without it, the machine spirit of Tirkuaz-4 would shut down and find peace."

traits.locale_text: 「異教徒が『アンカーコア』と呼ぶもの」が、敵のデカバルスによって汚された。このオムニシアの呪われた装置は、動力源で中央のドリルと安定化装置を動いていた。これがなければ、ティルクアズ4の機械霊は休むだろう。
「異教徒が『アンカーコア』と呼ぶものが、敵のデカバルスによって汚された。このオムニシアの呪われた装置は、動力源で中央のドリルと安定化装置を動いていた。これがなければ、ティルクアズ4の機械霊は休むだろう」

languages.text: «La xenoherejía que sus seguidores llamaban el "núcleo de anclaje". Mis camaradas caídos dijeron que el traidor Decabalus había profanado las pautas de energía sagradas de la estación. Este artilugio maldito por el Omnissiah alimentaba el complejo perforador central y los mecanismos de estabilización con Fuerza Motriz. Sin él, el espíritu máquina de Tirkuaz 4 se apagará y conocerá la paz».
languages.original_text: "The xenoheresy referred to by its followers as the 'anchor-core.'" My fallen comrades said that the traitor Decabalus had desecrated the station's sacred energy patterns. This Omnissiah-damned device was powering the central drill complex and stabilisation mechanisms with the Motive Force. Without it, the machine spirit of Tirkuaz-4 would shut down and find peace."

traits.locale_text: «La xenoherejía que sus seguidores llamaban el "núcleo de anclaje". Mis camaradas caídos dijeron que el traidor Decabalus había profanado las pautas de energía sagradas de la estación. Este artilugio maldito por el Omnissiah alimentaba el complejo perforador central y los mecanismos de estabilización con Fuerza Motriz. Sin él, el espíritu máquina de Tirkuaz 4 se apagará y conocerá la paz».

languages.text: “异端追随者称这个异形造物为‘锚核’。我已故的同僚曾言，叛徒德卡巴洛斯玷污了星站的神圣能量回路。这台遭欧姆尼赛亚诅咒的装置，一直在用源力驱动中央钻探中枢和稳定系统。没了它，提库阿兹4号的机魂便会停转，归于安息。”
languages.original_text: "The xenoheresy referred to by its followers as the 'anchor-core.'" My fallen comrades said that the traitor Decabalus had desecrated the station's sacred energy patterns. This Omnissiah-damned device was powering the central drill complex and stabilisation mechanisms with the Motive Force. Without it, the machine spirit of Tirkuaz-4 would shut down and find peace."

traits.locale_text: “异端追随者称这个异形造物为‘锚核’。我已故的同僚曾言，叛徒德卡巴洛斯玷污了星站的神圣能量回路。这台遭欧姆尼赛亚诅咒的装置，一直在用源力驱动中央钻探中枢和稳定系统。没了它，提库阿兹4号的机魂便会停转，归于安息。”

languages.text: "Die von ihren Anhängern als 'Ankerkern' bezeichnete Xeno-Ketzerei." Meine gefallenen Kameraden sagten, Verräter Decabalus hätte die heiligen Energiemuster der Station entweiht. Dieses omnissiahverdammte Gerät versorgte den zentralen Bohrkomplex und seine Stabilisierungsmechanismen mit Antriebskraft. Ohne das Gerät würde sich der Maschinengeist von Tirkuaz-4 abschalten und Frieden finden."
languages.original_text: "The xenoheresy referred to by its followers as the 'anchor-core.'" My fallen comrades said that the traitor Decabalus had desecrated the station's sacred energy patterns. This Omnissiah-damned device was powering the central drill complex and stabilisation mechanisms with the Motive Force. Without it, the machine spirit of Tirkuaz-4 would shut down and find peace."

traits.locale_text: "Die von ihren Anhängern als 'Ankerkern' bezeichnete Xeno-Ketzerei." Meine gefallenen Kameraden sagten, Verräter Decabalus hätte die heiligen Energiemuster der Station entweiht. Dieses omnissiahverdammte Gerät versorgte den zentralen Bohrkomplex und seine Stabilisierungsmechanismen mit Antriebskraft. Ohne das Gerät würde sich der Maschinengeist von Tirkuaz-4 abschalten und Frieden finden."

languages.text: "Takipçilerinin 'çapa çekirdeği' olarak adlandırdığı zeno kâfirliği. Yiten yoldaşlarım, hain Decabalus'un istasyonun kutsal enerji modellerine saygısızlık ettiğini söylemişti. Hermesih'in lanetlediği bu cihaz, merkezî sondaj kompleksine ve dengeleme mekanizmalarına Devinim Gücü sağlıyordu. O olmadan Tirkuaz-4'ün makine ruhu kapanacak ve huzura kavuşacak."
languages.original_text: "The xenoheresy referred to by its followers as the 'anchor-core.'" My fallen comrades said that the traitor Decabalus had desecrated the station's sacred energy patterns. This Omnissiah-damned device was powering the central drill complex and stabilisation mechanisms with the Motive Force. Without it, the machine spirit of Tirkuaz-4 would shut down and find peace."

traits.locale_text: "Takipçilerinin 'çapa çekirdeği' olarak adlandırdığı zeno kâfirliği. Yiten yoldaşlarım, hain Decabalus'un istasyonun kutsal enerji modellerine saygısızlık ettiğini söylemişti. Hermesih'in lanetlediği bu cihaz, merkezî sondaj kompleksine ve dengeleme mekanizmalarına Devinim Gücü sağlıyordu. O olmadan Tirkuaz-4'ün makine ruhu kapanacak ve huzura kavuşacak."

languages.text: « La xénohérésie nommée "noyau ancestral" par ses adeptes. D'après mes anciens camarades, le traître Décabalus a profané les schémas énergétiques sacrés de la station. Ce maudit appareil tirait son énergie de la Force Motrice pour alimenter le complexe de forage central et les mécanismes de stabilisation. Sans lui, l'esprit de la machine de Tirkuaz-4 se serait éteint et aurait trouvé la paix. »
languages.original_text: "The xenoheresy referred to by its followers as the 'anchor-core.'" My fallen comrades said that the traitor Decabalus had desecrated the station's sacred energy patterns.
